name: Hot Cocoa Mix
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Hershey's Cocoa or European Style Cocoa
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine all ingredients and blend well.
2. Store in a tightly covered container.
3. The mix yields approximately 3-3/4 cups (about fifteen 6-ounce servings).
4. For one serving: Place 1/4 cup of the mix in a heatproof cup or mug. Add 3/4 cup boiling water. Stir to blend. Serve hot, and top with marshmallow if desired.
(Note: Hershey's is a registered trademark of Hershey Foods Corporation. This recipe may be reprinted courtesy of the Hershey Kitchens.)
